who: HR managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll adjustments/month
offer: For HR managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll adjustments/month, manual payroll adjustments cause errors and delays. We automate payroll adjustments instead of manual tracking.
problem: Manual payroll adjustments lead to errors and delays.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR managers seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on payroll workflows
Direct message 20-50 HR managers with a demo video
Share insights in community forums for HR managers
try_it: Let users try time-off request monitoring and dashboard features
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding to first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Set default reminder schedules for tasks
Enable CSV import for existing payroll data
Allow one-click export of simple reports
